adjutorix.agentHost.description: Hostname or IP address of the local Adjutorix agent.

adjutorix.agentPort.description: Port used by the local Adjutorix agent server.

adjutorix.autoRunCheckOnSave.description: Automatically run Agent: Check when a file is saved.

adjutorix.enableDiagnostics.description: Enable publishing agent diagnostics to the Problems panel.

adjutorix.maxContextFiles.description: Maximum number of files included in LLM context.

adjutorix.logLevel.description: Logging verbosity for the Adjutorix extension.
